codeReview.summary: The isolated commit adds several useful VAL-CATALOG regression assertions, but it also pulls unrelated VAL-EXT negative-path coverage into this feature diff, so the commit is not actually scoped to the assigned catalog/simple/search/global surfaces.

issues.description: This feature was explicitly scoped to catalog/simple/search/global guards, but the commit also adds a new omnibus test for exchanges, treasury, and onchain VAL-EXT negative-path assertions. That expands the auditable feature diff beyond the assigned surface area, undermining the orchestrator requirement for an isolated catalog-only commit tied to this feature.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, mission docs, and commit ae5f99a51db5f16657fbbe62c64e3bf4469fc710. The catalog/simple/search/global regression coverage itself looks sound, but the supposedly isolated feature commit is not actually isolated because it also introduces unrelated VAL-EXT regression coverage in tests/invalid-params.test.ts.
